parameters.query:
SELECT form_name, section_field_id, section_field_name 
FROM kbg_form_config 
WHERE form_id = '{{ $json.body?.form_id || $json.form_id }}' AND active = true

INSERT INTO kbg_scans (
  scan_id, scanned_at, date_from, date_to, form_name,
  total_tickets, total_topics, coverage_score,
  total_deflection_potential, true_gaps, quality_gaps,
  discoverability_gaps, covered, high_priority, medium_priority
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.scan_id }}',
  '{{ $json.scanned_at }}',
  '{{ $json.date_from }}',
  '{{ $json.date_to }}',
  '{{ $json.form_name }}',
  {{ $json.total_tickets }},
  {{ $json.total_topics }},
  {{ $json.coverage_score }},
  {{ $json.total_deflection_potential }},
  {{ $json.summary.true_gaps }},
  {{ $json.summary.quality_gaps }},
  {{ $json.summary.discoverability_gaps }},
  {{ $json.summary.covered }},
  {{ $json.summary.high_priority }},
  {{ $json.summary.medium_priority }}
)
ON CONFLICT (scan_id) DO NOTHING;

INSERT INTO kbg_sections (
  scan_id, section_feature, topic_name, ticket_count, pct_of_total,
  gap_type, gap_summary, recommended_action, priority,
  deflection_potential, kcs_adoption_pct,
  article_linked_yes, article_linked_no, article_linked_null,
  recommended_articles
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.scan_id }}',
  '{{ $json.section_feature }}',
  '{{ $json.topic_name }}',
  {{ $json.ticket_count }},
  {{ $json.pct_of_total }},
  '{{ $json.gap_type }}',
  '{{ $json.gap_summary.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.recommended_action.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.priority }}',
  {{ $json.deflection_potential }},
  {{ $json.kcs_adoption_pct }},
  {{ $json.article_linked_yes }},
  {{ $json.article_linked_no }},
  {{ $json.article_linked_null }},
  '{{ $json.recommended_articles }}'::jsonb
)
ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;

SELECT 
  s.scan_id, s.scanned_at, s.date_from, s.date_to, s.form_name,
  s.total_tickets, s.total_topics, s.coverage_score,
  s.total_deflection_potential, s.true_gaps, s.quality_gaps,
  s.discoverability_gaps, s.covered, s.high_priority, s.medium_priority,
  json_agg(
    json_build_object(
      'topic_name', sec.topic_name,
      'section_feature', sec.section_feature,
      'ticket_count', sec.ticket_count,
      'pct_of_total', sec.pct_of_total,
      'gap_type', sec.gap_type,
      'gap_summary', sec.gap_summary,
      'recommended_action', sec.recommended_action,
      'priority', sec.priority,
      'deflection_potential', sec.deflection_potential,
      'kcs_adoption_pct', sec.kcs_adoption_pct
    ) ORDER BY sec.ticket_count DESC
  ) as sections
FROM kbg_scans s
JOIN kbg_sections sec ON sec.scan_id = s.scan_id
WHERE s.scan_id = '{{ $json.body?.scan_id || $json.scan_id }}'
   OR (('{{ $json.body?.scan_id || $json.scan_id }}' = '' OR '{{ $json.body?.scan_id || $json.scan_id }}' = 'undefined') 
   AND s.scanned_at = (SELECT MAX(scanned_at) FROM kbg_scans))
GROUP BY s.scan_id, s.scanned_at, s.date_from, s.date_to, s.form_name,
  s.total_tickets, s.total_topics, s.coverage_score,
  s.total_deflection_potential, s.true_gaps, s.quality_gaps,
  s.discoverability_gaps, s.covered, s.high_priority, s.medium_priority;
